name: LSI Industries Inc.
description: LSI Industries Inc. is a leading producer of high-performance, American-made lighting and display solutions. Founded in 1976, the company is a vertically integrated manufacturer specializing in commercial indoor and outdoor lighting, as well as graphics and display products. LSI serves a diverse range of market verticals, including car dealerships, convenience stores, gas stations, and fast-food restaurants. Headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio, the company focuses on innovation and quality, providing comprehensive lighting and visual communication solutions designed to enhance business environments and improve operational efficiency for its clients across the United States and beyond.
